Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface PrimitiveBooleanValidator

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleBooleanValidator<PrimitiveBooleanValidator>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<PrimitiveBooleanValidator,Boolean>
All Known Implementing Classes:
PrimitiveBooleanValidatorImpl, PrimitiveBooleanValidatorNoOp
public interface PrimitiveBooleanValidator extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<PrimitiveBooleanValidator>
Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean value.
